title: lantana camara f. mutabilis
intro: Lantana camara f. mutabilis is a variety of the Lantana camara plant, a flowering shrub native to the Americas, known for its clusters of small, fragrant flowers that change colors as they mature. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Lantana camara f. mutabilis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against certain diseases. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, and is also used in aromatherapy due to its fragrant flowers.
